step_rationale: Metabolite elevation in myocardial injury; indirect stress-response marker.
mechanism: Tryptophan metabolite upregulated in myocardial necrosis, reflecting cardiomyocyte damage and metabolic stress.

references.title: Metabolic Profiling Reveals Diagnostic Biomarkers for Distinguishing Myocarditis From Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Plasma metabolomics reveals a potential panel of biomarkers for early diagnosis in acute coronary syndrome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
